## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between GrowthX and RAMP to discuss SEO performance, content updates, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Most charts shifted to GA4, showing encouraging upward trend vs. GSC's range-bound data](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Expense category pages saw unexplained traffic drop; likely due to loss of ancillary keywords](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [New content (vendor pages, best bank articles) delivered; awaiting RAMP team feedback](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Technical SEO analysis planned to cover bases, though no major issues suspected](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

## Topics

### GA4 Migration and Data Discrepancies

  - [Most charts now use GA4 data, except one](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [GA4 shows upward trend for blog pages, unlike GSC's range-bound data](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Looker report updated with GA4 data](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Some data discrepancies between GA4 and GSC, but within expected range](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)

### Content Refresh Recommendations

  - [List of URLs for refresh provided weeks ago](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Victoria: BCC URLs don't need refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Luke assigned accounting-related URLs to Ali for review](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Ali to select one URL for trial refresh](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)

### SEO Performance Overview

  - [Pages holding steady in rankings, similar to GSC data](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [No major ranking losses observed](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [RAMP switching positions with Navan and TravelPerk in most cases](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [.com sites still ahead in rankings](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)

### Expense Category Pages Performance Drop

  - [Significant traffic drop observed in both GA4 and GSC](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [No single cause identified](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Still ranking well for core "expense" and "expense category" keywords](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Lost rankings for ancillary keywords (e.g., "software expense reviews")](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [GSC keyword data limited, making analysis challenging](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Luke's theory: Pages previously ranking for irrelevant keywords, now corrected](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Possible impact from April 15th update affecting the whole site](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)

### Technical SEO Analysis

  - [Basic Core Web Vitals review done last month](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Nika running another review to flag issues](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Team to conduct more thorough technical analysis](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

### Tuning Pages Performance

  - [Showing better performance post-refresh compared to pre-refresh](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [11 featured snippets captured across all pages](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Cash flow metrics page most volatile but best-performing](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Treasury pages saw jump in sessions and views, lost couple snippets](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

### Vendor Pages and New Content

  - [Vendor pages showing stable performance](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Best bank articles and vendor pages delivered to RAMP team](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Ali confirmed receipt of bank pages with required data and tables](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

## Next Steps

  - [RAMP team to review and provide feedback on new vendor pages and best bank articles](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Ali to select one URL from accounting-related list for trial refresh](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [GrowthX to fix Google Sheet issues in Airtable as noted by Victoria](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct more thorough technical SEO analysis](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of newly published and pipeline pages](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [RAMP team to reach out via Slack if any questions arise before next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/zFH25Agk9rCj6Hy4wNKhQiKU_xtNzksE?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
